name: biteasy

metadata.name: BitEasy
metadata.summary: A Python Module to help in writing and reading bits in binary files.

documentation:
# BitEasy
A Python Module to help in writing and reading bits in binary files.

modules.name: biteasy
documentation:
BitEasy
A Python Module to help in writing and reading bits in binary files.

classes.name: biteasy._biteasy.BitString

methods.name: biteasy._biteasy.BitString.ConvertToInt
documentation:
ConvertToInt
------------
----------
Convert Bits to an intiger value.

----------
Input:
------
- signed:
  -------
    - Tells whether the output integer is signed.
    - Boolean

----------
Output:
-------
- An Intiger value.

methods.name: biteasy._biteasy.BitString.ConvertToBytes
documentation:
ConvertToBytes
--------------
----------
Convert Bits to bytes.

----------
Input:
------
- None

----------
Output:
-------
- Bytes

methods.name: biteasy._biteasy.BitString.ConvertToStr
documentation:
ConvertToStr
------------
----------
Convert the bits to a string using the encoding method.

----------
Input:
------
- encoding:
  ---------
    - The Encoding method used in the binary string.
    - String

----------
Output:
-------
- String with the encoding type specified.

BitString
---------
----------
A String of bits (0's and 1's).

----------
Input:
------
- bits:
  -----
    - A Sequence (tuple, list, range) of 0's and 1's.
    - Sequence[Union["0", "1"]]
----------
Output:
-------
- A String of bits.
- Functions to turn a String of bits to diffrent data types.

classes.name: biteasy._biteasy.readfrom

inner_classes.name: biteasy._biteasy.readfrom.file

methods.name: biteasy._biteasy.readfrom.file.readbits
documentation:
readbits
--------
----------
Read an amount of bits from a file.

----------
Input:
------
- offset:
  -------
    - The offset number at which to start reading bytes from the file.
    - Intiger
- amount:
  -------
    - The amount of bytes to start reading from the offset.
    - Intiger

----------
Output:
-------
- BitString (check BitString for more info).

file
----
----------
Read bits from a file.

----------
Input:
------
- file:
  -----
    - The full file path to the file.
    - FileDescriptorOrPath

----------
Output:
-------
- BitString (check BitString for more info).

inner_classes.name: biteasy._biteasy.readfrom.bytes

methods.name: biteasy._biteasy.readfrom.bytes.readbits
documentation:
readbits
--------
----------
Read an amount of bits from bytes.

----------
Input:
------
- offset:
  -------
    - The offset number at which to start reading bytes from the bytes.
    - Intiger
- amount:
  -------
    - The amount of bytes to start reading from the offset.
    - Intiger

----------
Output:
-------
- BitString (check BitString for more info).

bytes
-----
----------
Read bits from a bytes.

----------
Input:
------
- _bytes:
  -------
    - The bytes to read.
    - bytes

----------
Output:
-------
- BitString (check BitString for more info).

readfrom
--------
----------
Read Bits from an object.

----------
This class does not have input types, only subclasses.

----------
All subclasses in this class output a BitString (check BitString for more info).
